headline: Supply Chain Optimisation  │ Spare Parts Inventory │ Energy │ Automotive │ Account Executive at Lokad
about:
Working on inventory optimization with asset owner operators & service providers in the energy sector and with automotive aftermarket players to find the right financial and risk tradeoff between downtime risks and wasteful inventory.

How do you forecast & make decisions so that you have the right inventory level at the right time, in the right place? Well, the perfect forecast does not exist. What is going to happen tomorrow? Your guess is as good as mine, so why ignore this uncertainty when making purchasing, dispatch or production decisions?

Financial losses are concentrated in the extreme disruptions to demand and lead times, but inventory planning is usually based on averages. For lack of another way to adjust for these risks companies tend to hold an excessively large inventory.

To ensure optimal purchase, dispatch or manufacturing decisions, it is crucial to focus on the right things. With Lokad, this means forecasting the probability of all possible futures, rather than trying to accurately predict only one. This also means quantifying the risk & euro/dollar ROI of each inventory decision & prioritising the decisions with the highest ROI.

Having previously worked in the media sector to help citizens make their voices heard in constructive online debate, I now have the mission of helping asset owner operators and  automotive parts suppliers to understand their supply chain differently & reap the benefits of that.

Get in touch here on LinkedIn or shane.conroy@lokad.com

headline: Account Executive at Generated Systems Technologies, Inc.
Simplifying HR & Payroll | Account Executive @ Paycom
about:
Working with businesses in Maryland to improve processes, manage staff, and increase efficiency across Payroll and HR.

For 25 years, Paycom Software, Inc. (NYSE:PAYC) has simplified businesses and the lives of their 
employees through easy-to-use HR and payroll technology to empower transparency through direct 
access to their data. And thanks to its industry-first solution, Beti®, employees now do their own payroll 
and are guided to find and fix costly errors before payroll submission. From onboarding and benefits 
enrollment to talent management and more, Paycom’s software streamlines processes, drives 
efficiencies and gives employees power over their own HR information, all in a single app. Recognized 
nationally for its technology and workplace culture, Paycom can now serve businesses of all sizes in the 
U.S. and internationally.

Paycom has earned numerous accolades, including:

• Membership in the S&P 500
• Human Resource Executive® magazine’s 2019 Awesome New Technology award for Direct Data 
Exchange®, 2020 Top HR Product award for Manager on‐the‐Go® and 2021 Top HR Product 
award for Beti®
• BIG Innovation Award (2023)
• Fast Company Most Innovative Companies (2022)
• Newsweek Most Trustworthy Companies in America (2022-2023)
• Gallup Exceptional Workplace Award (2023)
• Top Workplaces USA award (2021-2023)
• Top Workplaces Oklahoma award for 10 consecutive years (2013-2023), earning the top spot in 
2016 and 2020
• The Wall Street Journal’s Best‐Managed Companies (2019-2020)

To see what Paycom does for your business, visit paycom.com/demo.

Paycom Baltimore
100 S Charles Street
Suite 1720
Baltimore, MD 21201
Email: yetunde.kehinde@paycomonline.com

experience.title: Account Executive
experience.description:
Paycom helps employers streamline their payroll and HR processes with our state-of-the-art technology. We were the first to offer payroll services via the web, and for over a decade our Software-as-a-Service (SaaS) solution has helped free companies from the constraints of traditional installed software. In addition to payroll processing we also offer time and attendance, HRIS, benefit administration, background checks, WOTC filing, applicant tracking and COBRA compliance -- all in a single online application.

Paycom is growing at a phenomenal pace by providing cutting-edge technology and personal payroll expertise and friendly services. We’ve been ranked on the INC 500/500 list of the fastest growing private companies year after year for growth and retention. Paycom recently won a prestigious Stevie Award for sales excellence. We have customers in every state.

What sets us apart:
- One seamless application for all your employees’ HR needs
- One-to-one customer service model
- ISO 9001/27001/22301-certified

As one of the fastest-growing companies in the country, Paycom has earned numerous accolades,
 including:
- Fortune’s 100 Fastest Growing Companies List (2017-2018)
- Forbes’ Fast Tech 25 List (2017)
- HR.com's Leadership Excellence Award (2014, 2015 and 2017)
Glassdoor’s Employees’ Choice Award as one of the Best Large-Sized Companies in the U.S. to Work
For (2015, 2016 and 2019)

To request a demo of Paycom, visit Paycom.com/demo.

headline: On a mission to end human-driven cyber breaches🛡️
about:
Having over 10 years of experience in sales, spanning sales management and SaaS account executive roles, helping businesses grow and thrive across different markets. My career has taken me from Sheffield to Madrid, Javea, and now Valencia, giving me a mix of local insight and international perspective when it comes to building strong customer relationships.

Today, I help companies reduce cyber risk by fixing where it often starts: human behaviour.

At Pistachio, we deliver automated, personalised cyber training that actually changes how people respond to threats. No boring slides. No one-size-fits-all. Just smarter training that sticks.

We’re growing fast across Europe, working with businesses that want to stay ahead of human-driven risk without burning time or budget.

Originally from Sheffield, now living in Valencia. Blades fan (unfortunately). Always up for a chat about football, security, or both.

experience.title: Account Executive
experience.description:
As an Account Executive at Pistachio, I focus on driving revenue while helping companies reduce cyber risk where it starts — with people.

I work with security and IT leaders across Europe to introduce a smarter, low-effort approach to cyber awareness training that actually changes behaviour (not just tick boxes).

Helping teams stay secure, hit their KPIs, and avoid becoming tomorrow’s headline.

A significant part of my role was conducting discovery calls via Zoom, where I assessed client requirements, identified challenges, and presented tailored solutions. I worked closely with internal teams to identify unique client needs, ensuring that our offerings met their expectations. I also provided consistent follow-up through email and phone calls, keeping clients informed about upcoming global summits that aligned with their investment interests.

headline: B2B SaaS | Account Executive | Outbound & Inbound Specialist | Lead & Demand Generation | Consultative, trust based selling
about:
Turning conversations into long-term partnerships.

Results-driven, customer-centric sales professional with proven success in both outbound and inbound B2B sales. I conduct deep discovery sessions to understand each prospect’s situation, requirements, and expectations—deciding if and how I can truly help. When aligned, I guide decision-makers through a structured journey from Pain (awareness & recognition), to Possibility (imagination & desire), to Action (contrast & decision).

I position myself as an advisor, not a salesperson—using consultative, trust-based methods that show decision-makers I’m invested in their growth. With experience in building high-value relationships with CXOs and stakeholders of multimillion-dollar companies, I focus on solving problems, not just selling. Clients trust me as the consultant they can rely on for clear, growth-driven advice.

Excited to partner with organizations whose products create real impact.

headline: Founding Account Executive @ CaseMark l Legal Tech l AI
about:
I kind of fell into the B2B SaaS startup world and never left.

I’ve spent 8 plus years in B2B SaaS, mostly at early stage startups where you end up wearing every hat SDR, AE, account management, customer support, whatever needs to get done. I enjoy building from scratch, figuring out what’s not working, and moving quickly to fix it.

I’m not someone who waits around for direction. I take ownership, execute, and if something breaks, I own it, learn from it, and move forward. That’s just how I operate.

experience.title: Founding Account Executive
experience.description:
CaseMark is an AI-powered platform built with lawyers to summarize depositions, medical records, and legal transcripts, accurately and at scale.

We're SOC2 & HIPAA compliant, can process 40,000+ documents, and support law firms and litigation partners through both PLG and white-label models.

I lead outbound sales and partnerships, helping firms save time, reduce burnout, and win more cases.

experience.title: Co-Founder

Own revenue operations, sales ops, and internal systems. Built and manage the website and GTM tooling, implemented finance, CRM, and inventory workflows, and designed repeatable processes to support growth. Act as the backend operator so sales, delivery, and cash flow run cleanly.

(Outside of full-time role)

experience.title: Head of Sales and Partnerships
experience.description: I was brought in to build out the B2B side of the business. After talking with schools and career teams, I found two big challenges in the market: university budgets were being cut, and job placement for CS/PM students was down due to tech hiring slowdowns. Because of this, I recommended we stay focused on our strong B2C product for now and revisit B2B when the market improves.

education.description: I earned a Business Administration Diploma from [Your College Name], where I developed a strong foundation in sales, marketing, finance, and business strategy. Through coursework in business development, leadership, and organizational management, I gained valuable expertise in customer relationship management (CRM), negotiation, and data-driven decision-making. My studies also emphasized analytical thinking, problem-solving, and effective communication, allowing me to apply these skills to real-world business scenarios. This education has strengthened my ability to manage client relationships, communicate complex information, and drive sales growth.

During my time at the University of Manitoba, I studied in the Faculty of Science, with a strong focus on chemistry. I pursued my undergraduate degree with the goal of advancing into medical school, driven by a passion for healthcare and scientific discovery. Throughout my studies, I developed analytical thinking, problem-solving skills, and a deep understanding of scientific principles. While I ultimately chose to pursue new opportunities in Vancouver, my academic experience provided me with a strong foundation in critical reasoning, research, and discipline—skills that continue to benefit me in my professional career.

headline: Account Executive
Account Executive at Salesforce | SaaS Sales Professional | CRM
about:
I’m an Account Executive at Salesforce, driving revenue growth for B2B SaaS clients through consistent quota achievement, disciplined pipeline management, and a strong understanding of customer needs.

Over the years, I’ve built a reputation for owning the full sales cycle — from prospecting and qualification to running high-impact discovery and closing deals. My strength lies in building predictable pipelines, managing complex stakeholder conversations, and ensuring every deal moves forward with purpose.

Consistency is a big part of who I am. Whether it’s building fresh pipeline every quarter or hitting targets under pressure, I focus on habits, execution, and strong customer relationships to get results.

I’m now focused on opportunities where I can contribute to high-growth SaaS teams, take on larger accounts, and continue evolving as a strategic revenue driver.

3- Actively trained and mentored new recruits in the K3, K10, and K12 Sales Departments, ensuring high performance and alignment with sales targets.
4- Utilized platforms like LeadSquared and Orderhive for lead capture automation, sales acceleration, and analytics, enhancing the efficiency of sales and reporting systems.
5- Managed the entire sales cycle from prospecting to closing, coordinated after-sales support to minimize product returns, and collaborated with finance, product, and tech teams to improve customer experience and implement new initiatives.
Key Achievements:
• Achieved the Top Performer award for consecutive 4 weeks.
• Recognized and rewarded to being among the top 20 managers (in terms of revenue generation)
• Generated revenue over 65 lakhs in last 6 months as a Team Lead.

Ricoh offers a variety of services and solutions that are all focused on improving the customer’s business.

majors: Business, Management, Marketing, and Related Support Services

headline: Account Executive | HPE Renew | Dell | Microsoft | Synergy Associates
about: Synergy Associates is a US Distributor of HPE Renew and Dell Recertified enterprise servers, storage and Aruba networking. My goal is to offer reseller partners, MSPs, data center operations and authorized companies products that carry a full factory warranty and the service commitment from the manufactory and Synergy.

headline: Supporting Digital Language Learning in Higher Education, Northern Markets | goFLUENT
about:
As Account Executive for the Northern markets at goFLUENT, I help universities and higher education institutions enhance language learning at scale - with solutions designed for today's globally connected and resource-conscious campuses.

Many of the institutions I support are exploring new ways to:
- Deliver language training more flexibly for students and staff
- Extend the reach of their language centre without overextending resources
- Blend classroom teaching with digital tools that are scalable, inclusive, and easy to deploy.

My work bridges the gap between pedagogical goals and practical delivery - partnering with language educators, digital learning teams, and academic leadership to make language learning more accessible and impactful.

I’m always open to connecting with professionals who are shaping the future of language and communication education in Northern markets. Let’s exchange ideas.

experience.title: Account Executive - Nordics
experience.description:
As Account Executive – Nordics at goFLUENT, I lead our expansion into the Nordic higher education sector, working with universities and vocational institutions in Finland, Sweden, and Norway to improve and scale their language learning provision through digital innovation.

My focus is on engaging with leaders in language centres, educational technology, and institutional digitalisation to explore how goFLUENT’s AI-powered language learning platform can enhance pedagogical outcomes, streamline operations, and advance institutional goals.

headline: Senior Account Executive @ Roofr | Inbound Sales, Outbound Sales
about:
As a Senior Account Executive at Roofr, I leverage my expertise in SaaS sales and my background in B2B/B2C sales to help businesses achieve their goals and enhance their customer experiences. With over 5 years of experience in this role and six years in the travel industry, I have developed a strong understanding of the needs and challenges of various sectors and markets.

I am passionate about building long-lasting and mutually beneficial relationships with my clients, while also creating a collaborative and supportive work environment for my team. I have contributed to the revenue and profit growth of Jobber by closing multiple deals, upselling existing customers, and generating referrals. I also mentor and coach new staff and share best practices and insights from my extensive sales career.

experience.title: International Travel Consultant

I built and sustained strong relationships with clients, airlines, and industry suppliers, managed financial statements and associated documentation, and consistently achieved weekly revenue and profit targets—all while providing professional development and coaching for new staff.
